content: For suspected acute coronary syndrome: administer aspirin 324mg chewable, obtain ECG within 10 minutes, give oxygen if SpO2 <90%, activate cath lab if STEMI.
For major trauma: ABCDE approach, cervical spine immobilization, large bore IV access, tranexamic acid if bleeding.
For dental emergencies: control bleeding with gauze, refer to dentist within 24 hours.
